name: BoundingBox
summary: Represents the value of two points in a bounding box defined by the two extreme corner points. This box is therefore aligned to the world X, Y and Z axes.

constructors.name: BoundingBox(IEnumerable<Point3d>)
constructors.summary: Constructs a bounding box from a collection of points.

params.name: points
params.doc: Points to include in the bounding box.

constructors.name: BoundingBox(Point3d, Point3d)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new bounding box from two corner points.

params.name: min
params.doc: Point containing all the minimum coordinates.

params.name: max
params.doc: Point containing all the maximum coordinates.

constructors.name: BoundingBox(IEnumerable<Point3d>, Transform)
constructors.summary: Constructs a bounding box from a collection of points.

params.name: points
params.doc: Points to include in the bounding box.

params.name: xform
params.doc: Transformation.

constructors.name: BoundingBox(Double, Double, Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public BoundingBox(double minX, double minY, double minZ, double maxX, double maxY, double maxZ)
constructors.summary: Constructs a bounding box from numeric extremes.

params.name: minX
params.doc: Lower extreme for box X size.

params.name: minY
params.doc: Lower extreme for box Y size.

params.name: minZ
params.doc: Lower extreme for box Z size.

params.name: maxX
params.doc: Upper extreme for box X size.

params.name: maxY
params.doc: Upper extreme for box Y size.

params.name: maxZ
params.doc: Upper extreme for box Z size.

methods.name: ClosestPoint(Point3d)
methods.summary: Finds the closest point on or in the bounding box.

params.name: point
params.doc: Sample point.

returns.doc: The point on or in the box that is closest to the sample point.

methods.name: ClosestPoint(Point3d, Boolean)
methods.signature: public Point3d ClosestPoint(Point3d point, bool includeInterior)
methods.summary: Finds the closest point on or in the bounding box.

params.name: point
params.doc: Sample point.

params.name: includeInterior
params.doc: If false, the point is projected onto the boundary faces only, otherwise the interior of the box is also taken into consideration.

returns.doc: The point on or in the box that is closest to the sample point.

methods.name: Contains(BoundingBox)
methods.summary: Determines whether this bounding box contains another bounding box. This is the same as calling Contains(box,false).

params.name: box
params.doc: Box to test.

returns.doc: true if the box is on the inside of this bounding box, or is coincident with the surface of it.

methods.name: Contains(Point3d)
methods.summary: Tests a point for bounding box inclusion. This is the same as calling Contains(point, false)

params.name: point
params.doc: Point to test.

returns.doc: true if the point is on the inside of or coincident with this bounding box; otherwise false.

methods.name: Contains(BoundingBox, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Contains(BoundingBox box, bool strict)
methods.summary: Determines whether this bounding box contains another bounding box. The user can choose how to treat bounding boxes with coincident surfaces.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box to test.

params.name: strict
params.doc: If true, the box needs to be fully on the inside of the bounding box. I.e. coincident boxes will be considered 'outside'.

returns.doc: true if the box is (strictly) on the inside of this BoundingBox.

methods.name: Contains(Point3d, Boolean)
methods.signature: public bool Contains(Point3d point, bool strict)
methods.summary: Tests a point for BoundingBox inclusion.

params.name: point
params.doc: Point to test.

params.name: strict
params.doc: If true, the point needs to be fully on the inside of the BoundingBox. I.e. coincident points will be considered 'outside'.

returns.doc: If 'strict' is affirmative, true if the point is inside this bounding box; false if it is on the surface or outside.If 'strict' is negative, true if the point is on the surface or on the inside of the bounding box; otherwise false.

methods.name: Corner
methods.signature: public Point3d Corner(bool minX, bool minY, bool minZ)
methods.summary: Gets one of the eight corners of the box.

params.name: minX
params.doc: true for the minimum on the X axis; false for the maximum.

params.name: minY
params.doc: true for the minimum on the Y axis; false for the maximum.

params.name: minZ
params.doc: true for the minimum on the Z axis; false for the maximum.

methods.name: FurthestPoint
methods.summary: Finds the furthest point on the Box.

params.name: point
params.doc: Sample point.

returns.doc: The point on the box that is furthest from the sample point.

methods.name: GetCorners
methods.summary: Gets an array filled with the 8 corner points of this box. See remarks for the return order.
methods.remarks: [0] Min.X, Min.Y, Min.Z[1] Max.X, Min.Y, Min.Z[2] Max.X, Max.Y, Min.Z[3] Min.X, Max.Y, Min.Z[4] Min.X, Min.Y, Max.Z[5] Max.X, Min.Y, Max.Z[6] Max.X, Max.Y, Max.Z[7] Min.X, Max.Y, Max.Z

methods.name: GetEdges
methods.summary: Gets an array of the 12 edges of this box.

returns.doc: If the bounding box IsValid, the 12 edges; otherwise, null.

methods.name: Inflate(Double)
methods.summary: Inflates the box with equal amounts in all directions. Inflating with negative amounts may result in decreasing boxes. Invalid boxes can not be inflated.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount (in model units) to inflate this box in all directions.

methods.name: Inflate(Double, Double, Double)
methods.signature: public void Inflate(double xAmount, double yAmount, double zAmount)
methods.summary: Inflate the box with custom amounts in all directions. Inflating with negative amounts may result in decreasing boxes. InValid boxes can not be inflated.

params.name: xAmount
params.doc: Amount (in model units) to inflate this box in the x direction.

params.name: yAmount
params.doc: Amount (in model units) to inflate this box in the y direction.

params.name: zAmount
params.doc: Amount (in model units) to inflate this box in the z direction.

methods.name: Intersection
methods.signature: public static BoundingBox Intersection(BoundingBox a, BoundingBox b)
methods.summary: Computes the intersection of two bounding boxes.

params.name: a
params.doc: A first bounding box.

params.name: b
params.doc: A second bounding box.

methods.name: IsDegenerate
methods.summary: Determines whether a bounding box is degenerate (flat) in one or more directions.

params.name: tolerance
params.doc: Distances <= tolerance will be considered to be zero. If tolerance is negative (default), then a scale invariant tolerance is used.

returns.doc: 0 = box is not degenerate 1 = box is a rectangle (degenerate in one direction). 2 = box is a line (degenerate in two directions). 3 = box is a point (degenerate in three directions) 4 = box is not valid.

methods.name: MakeValid
methods.summary: Ensures that the box is defined in an increasing fashion along X, Y and Z axes. If the Min or Max points are unset, this function will not change the box.

returns.doc: true if the box was made valid, false if the box could not be made valid.

methods.name: PointAt
methods.signature: public Point3d PointAt(double tx, double ty, double tz)
methods.summary: Evaluates the bounding box with normalized parameters. The box has idealized side length of 1x1x1.

params.name: tx
params.doc: Normalized (between 0 and 1 is inside the box) parameter along the X direction.

params.name: ty
params.doc: Normalized (between 0 and 1 is inside the box) parameter along the Y direction.

params.name: tz
params.doc: Normalized (between 0 and 1 is inside the box) parameter along the Z direction.

returns.doc: The point at the {tx, ty, tz} parameters.

methods.name: ToBrep
methods.summary: Constructs a Brep representation of this bounding box.

returns.doc: If this operation is successful, a Brep representation of this box; otherwise null.

methods.name: ToString
methods.summary: Constructs the string representation of this aligned bounding box.

methods.name: Transform
methods.summary: Updates this bounding box to be the smallest axis aligned bounding box that contains the transformed result of its 8 original corner points.

params.name: xform
params.doc: A transform.

returns.doc: true if this operation is successful; otherwise false.

methods.name: Union(BoundingBox)
methods.summary: Updates this BoundingBox to represent the union of itself and another box.
methods.remarks: If either this BoundingBox or the other BoundingBox is InValid, the Valid BoundingBox will be the only one included in the union.

params.name: other
params.doc: Box to include in this union.

methods.name: Union(Point3d)
methods.summary: Updates this BoundingBox to represent the union of itself and a point.
methods.remarks: If this bounding box is InValid then the union will be the BoundingBox containing only the point. If the point is InValid, this BoundingBox will remain unchanged.

params.name: point
params.doc: Point to include in the union.

methods.name: Union(BoundingBox, BoundingBox)
methods.signature: public static BoundingBox Union(BoundingBox a, BoundingBox b)
methods.summary: Returns a new BoundingBox that represents the union of boxes a and b.
methods.remarks: Invalid boxes are ignored and will not affect the union.

params.name: a
params.doc: First box to include in union.

params.name: b
params.doc: Second box to include in union.

returns.doc: The BoundingBox that contains both a and b.

methods.name: Union(BoundingBox, Point3d)
methods.signature: public static BoundingBox Union(BoundingBox box, Point3d point)
methods.summary: Returns a new BoundingBox that represents the union of a bounding box and a point.
methods.remarks: Invalid boxes and points are ignored and will not affect the union.

params.name: box
params.doc: Box to include in the union.

params.name: point
params.doc: Point to include in the union.

returns.doc: The BoundingBox that contains both the box and the point.

properties.name: Area
properties.summary: Gets the area of this BoundingBox.

properties.name: Center
properties.summary: Gets the point in the center of the bounding box.

properties.name: Diagonal
properties.summary: Gets the diagonal vector of this BoundingBox. The diagonal connects the Min and Max points.

properties.name: Empty
properties.summary: Gets an [Empty] bounding box. An Empty box is an invalid structure that has negative width.

properties.name: IsValid
properties.summary: Gets a value that indicates whether or not this bounding box is valid. Empty boxes are not valid, and neither are boxes with unset points.

properties.name: Max
properties.summary: Gets or sets the point in the maximal corner.

properties.name: Min
properties.summary: Gets or sets the point in the minimal corner.

properties.name: Unset
properties.summary: Gets a bounding box that has Unset coordinates for Min and Max.

properties.name: Volume
properties.summary: Gets the volume of this BoundingBox.
